name: issueflow
description: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflow skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: A bundled skill pack for raising, validating, dispatching, implementing, proving, merging, and releasing issue-scoped work with durable QA evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use issueflow to turn this feature idea into ready issues.
Use issueflow to dispatch and prove this issue branch.
Use issueflow to decide whether this branch can merge.
